reasoning: Valencia has not won La Liga since 2004, and the league continues to be heavily dominated by Real Madrid, Barcelona, and Atlético Madrid. Entering the 2025–2026 season, bookmakers listed Valencia’s odds at 101.00, implying a less than 1% chance of winning. Opta Supercomputer predictions also assigned them a near-zero chance, explicitly stating that no team outside the big three, along with Villarreal and Athletic Club, has more than a 2% chance. Furthermore, performance updates from September 2025 show Valencia struggling at the bottom half of the table (around 15th place) and suffering heavy defeats. Given their ongoing financial struggles under ownership and their poor start to the current campaign, a miraculous run to win the league is practically impossible. I assess their chances at the minimum possible probability bound of 0.02.
